name: Taxable Fuel Nontaxable Use Relief

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers who can demonstrate that fuel was used in a manner that does not trigger the standard excise tax liability.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides relief from excise tax in cases where taxable fuel is ultimately used for a nontaxable purpose via cross-reference to section 6427.
